title: Bank NXT (Egypt) Profile & Reviews
description: Explore a detailed profile and institutional data for Bank NXT in Egypt. Share your experience or access institutional-grade data for professional insights.

faq.question: What is Bank NXT?
faq.answer: Bank NXT is a leading provider of integrated retail and corporate banking solutions in Egypt, operating as a subsidiary of EFG Holding. Formerly known as aiBANK until its rebranding on September 30, 2024, the bank positions itself as "Egypt's boutique bank of choice," serving individuals, business owners, and institutions with a focus on speed, innovation, and distinctive quality. As of 2024, Bank NXT has a paid-up capital of EGP 5.4 billion and operates 36 branches nationwide, including three Islamic banking branches. The bank's ownership structure consists of EFG Holding (51%), Egypt's Financial Services and Digital Transformation Sub-Fund (25%), and National Investment Bank (24%). Bank NXT achieved a record net profit of EGP 1.77 billion in 2024, marking a 54% year-on-year growth.

faq.question: When was Bank NXT founded?
faq.answer: Bank NXT was originally established in 1974 as an investment and business bank. The bank commenced its activities under the supervision of the Central Bank of Egypt in 1978 with an initial capital base of USD 40 million. The bank underwent significant transformation throughout its history, with continuous capital growth reaching EGP 1.987 billion in 2020. A major milestone occurred on October 10, 2021, when the bank completed an acquisition deal and increased its paid-up capital to EGP 5 billion, adjusting its ownership structure to accommodate new investors including EFG Holding as majority shareholder. On September 30, 2024, the bank completed its rebranding from aiBANK to Bank NXT, marking a transformative step toward greater innovation and customer-centricity. This rebrand reflects the bank's vision for a faster, more efficient, and digitally driven banking experience. In March 2024, a further capital increase was approved, bringing the total paid-up capital to EGP 5.4 billion.

faq.question: Where is Bank NXT headquartered?
faq.answer: Bank NXT is headquartered in Cairo, Egypt. The bank operates under the supervision and regulatory oversight of the Central Bank of Egypt. As part of EFG Holding's universal banking platform in Egypt, Bank NXT benefits from the resources and support of its parent company while maintaining independent operational management focused on its boutique banking strategy.

faq.question: Where does Bank NXT operate?
faq.answer: Bank NXT operates throughout Egypt with a network of 36 branches covering major cities and strategic locations nationwide. Key branch locations include Cairo, Giza, Alexandria, Madinaty, 6th of October City, and Assiut. The bank expanded its physical presence in 2024 by inaugurating three new branches in Madinaty, 6th of October, and Assiut. Demonstrating its commitment to inclusivity, the 6th of October and Assiut branches were specifically designed to serve customers with special needs. Bank NXT has an ambitious expansion plan targeting 50 branches by 2027. The bank's ATM network reached 115 machines in 2024, representing a 27% increase from 2023, with plans to expand to 190-200 ATMs by 2027. Additionally, Bank NXT provides cash deposit and withdrawal services for credit cards through Fawry outlets across Egypt, significantly extending its geographical reach.

faq.question: What services does Bank NXT offer?
faq.answer: Bank NXT offers comprehensive retail banking services including current accounts, savings accounts, time deposit products with competitive rates, and economic accounts designed to support financial inclusion. The bank introduced innovative deposit products in 2024, including time deposits with interest paid in advance for tenors up to six months at 20% paid upfront. The bank provides a redesigned suite of seven new debit and credit cards, including a co-branded prepaid card in partnership with Valu. Credit card services showed remarkable growth in 2024, with outstanding balances rising 390% year-on-year to EGP 392 million and issued cards increasing by 250%. Corporate and SME banking services include loan syndication for large national projects, trade finance, working capital facilities, and specialized financing solutions for small and medium enterprises. Bank NXT has surpassed the 25% regulatory requirement set by the Central Bank of Egypt for SME lending, with more than 10% dedicated specifically to small businesses. Islamic banking services are provided through three dedicated branches, overseen by a Sharia-compliant body ensuring adherence to Islamic banking criteria. Investment and treasury services are available for institutional and high-net-worth clients. Digital banking services include the Bank NXT mobile application launched in 2024, internet banking platform, governmental payment services (CPS) for corporate customers in collaboration with eFinance, and ATM services with enhanced capabilities including credit card deposits and PIN management. The bank partnered with MindGate Solutions to develop a digital banking platform for corporate clients set to launch in 2025. Advanced automation is being implemented through partnerships with UiPath and Red Hat, reducing deployment times by 40% and improving operational efficiency by 30%.

faq.question: What makes Bank NXT unique?
faq.answer: Bank NXT distinguishes itself as Egypt's boutique bank, emphasizing speed, convenience, and distinctive quality in service delivery. The bank's rebranding in 2024 reflects a strategic transformation toward becoming a culture-driven, client-focused institution with quick turnaround times and bespoke financial solutions. The bank has implemented cutting-edge technology infrastructure through partnerships with leading global technology providers. Collaborations with Red Hat for hybrid cloud solutions, UiPath for intelligent automation, and MindGate Solutions for digital banking platforms demonstrate Bank NXT's commitment to technological innovation. These implementations have reduced deployment times for new services by 40%, improved operational efficiency by 30%, and decreased incident resolution times by 20%. Bank NXT is actively pursuing an ambitious growth strategy targeting placement among Egypt's top 10 banks in terms of Return on Equity (ROE) and Return on Assets (ROA). The bank's 54% net profit growth in 2024 demonstrates strong momentum toward this goal. The bank has received prestigious recognition including "Transformational Leadership Excellence in Egypt" from the World Union of Arab Bankers in 2024 and "Best Local Bank" in Egypt by EMEA Finance African Banking Awards 2024. Bank NXT established a Digital Transformation Hub (Digital Factory) to accelerate its innovation initiatives and maintain its competitive edge in Egypt's evolving banking sector.

faq.question: What type of financial institution is Bank NXT?
faq.answer: Bank NXT is a universal commercial bank (masrif tijari) operating under Egyptian banking law and regulations. Licensed and supervised by the Central Bank of Egypt, the bank provides both conventional and Islamic banking services, making it a dual-window banking institution. As a universal bank, Bank NXT offers the full spectrum of banking services including retail banking, corporate banking, SME finance, investment banking, and treasury operations. The bank operates as a joint-stock company (S.A.E.) with a diversified ownership structure led by EFG Holding as majority shareholder. Bank NXT is a member of the Bank Deposits Insurance Scheme and complies with all Central Bank of Egypt regulatory requirements, including SME lending mandates and financial inclusion initiatives. The bank's structure allows it to serve individuals, small businesses, medium enterprises, and large corporations through specialized divisions tailored to each segment's needs.
